title.description: Ligama le-app leboniswa ekhanda. I-app yokutfola tincwadzi tekupheka temakhandlela emhlabeni wonke.

subtitle.text: Tfolani tincwadzi tekupheka tema emhlabeni wonke
subtitle.description: Iteksti lenesihloko leniboniswa ngaphansi kwegama le-app ekhanda.

heroTitle.text: Hlola Tintfo Letimnandzi Tema Mhlaba Wonkhe
heroTitle.description: Isihloko lesikhulu esigabeni se-hero ekhasini lasekhaya.

heroSubtitle.text: Buka tincwadzi letitfutfukisiwe letivela emakhishini emhlabeni wonke
heroSubtitle.description: Iteksti lenesihloko leniboniswa ngaphansi kwesihloko se-hero ekhasini lasekhaya.

featuredTitle.description: Isihloko sesigaba lesiboniswa phezulu kwegridi yekhadikhadi lelipheka.

cookingTime.description: Ligama lesikhatsi sekupheka ekhadikhadini lelipheka. {minutes} futsi lifakwa nenombolo yemizuzu.

difficulty.description: Ligama lebekwe ngaphambi kweleveli yekubucayi ekhadikhadini lelipheka.

easy.description: Ligama leleveli yekubucayi lekukhombisa incwadzi yekupheka kulula.

medium.description: Ligama leleveli yekubucayi lekukhombisa incwadzi yekupheka lesiphakathi.

hard.description: Ligama leleveli yekubucayi lekukhombisa incwadzi yekupheka lenzima.

ramenDescription.text: Umhluzi lomtfutfukile wemathambo enkukhu nenhloko lenemphilo, iqanda lelitsoftiwe kahle, kanye nematilosi lamasha.

margheritaDescription.text: Pitsa yekwakha yeNeapolitan ngeletamatisi leSan Marzano, i-mozzarella lemasha, kanye nebasil.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos lenyanyisiwe lenziwe ngepork, iphayinaphu, i-cilantro, kanye nelionji ematortilla e-corn.

butterChickenDescription.text: Inkukhu lenzima lephakanyisiwe esosini yetamatisi nebhotela lelinemafutha kanye neminongo lenuka kahle.

padThaiDescription.text: Imatilosi etiwashiwe ngekushisa ngeletshrimps, tofu, amakinati, kanye nesosisi yetamarind.

crepesDescription.text: Amakrepi lamatsandza, agcwele iNutella, amatamatisi lamasha, kanye nekhrimu lephukile.

label.description: Ligama lekwenta kube lula kutsi utfole lulwimi lwekushintja ekhanda.
